name: fv-usb
description: FV-USB skill evaluation — machine-readable test configuration

categories.name: skill_structure
categories.description: Verify SKILL.md files have correct frontmatter, sections, and references

categories.name: technical_accuracy
categories.description: Verify USB/xHCI technical content is correct (speeds, registers, protocols)

categories.name: cross_references
categories.description: Verify sub-skill references, doc links, and delegation tables are consistent

categories.name: platform_coverage
categories.description: Verify all target platforms (NVL, PTL, LNL, MTL, ARL) are covered

categories.name: debug_workflows
categories.description: Verify debug playbooks and triage flows are complete and actionable

categories.name: known_issues
categories.description: Verify known issues have HSDES IDs, classification, and workarounds

categories.name: uaol_coverage
categories.description: Verify UAOL/ACE content covers ACE3, ACE4, FIFO timing, offload behavior
